acknowledgeAlert(address,uint256).details: Guardians should verify if the searcher is legitimate

canSearch(address).details: Enforces rate limits, cooldowns, and lockouts

completeVerification(bytes32,bytes32).details: Must prove knowledge of recovery ID and pass additional checks

params.recoveryIdProof: Hash proving knowledge of recovery ID

depositClaimStake(address,uint256).details: Stake is refunded on successful recovery, slashed if fraudulent

elevateVerification(bytes32,uint8,bytes).details: For integration with off-chain KYC/identity verification

getMaskedVaultInfo(address,bytes32).details: Returns partial info until higher verification levels

initiateSecureSearch(string).details: First security gate - checks rate limits, creates verification session

params.recoveryId: The recovery ID to search for

returns.vaultFound: Whether a vault was found (doesn't reveal which one yet)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

refundStake(bytes32).details: Called by VaultRecoveryClaim after successful claim execution

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

slashStake(bytes32,string).details: Called when guardians reject or original owner challenges

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

acknowledgeAlert(address,uint256).notice: Guardian acknowledges alert about vault search

canSearch(address).notice: Check if searcher can perform a search

clearLockout(address).notice: Emergency: Clear lockout for legitimate user

completeVerification(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Complete verification to get access to vault info

depositClaimStake(address,uint256).notice: Deposit stake before initiating recovery claim

elevateVerification(bytes32,uint8,bytes).notice: Trusted verifier can elevate verification level

getMaskedVaultInfo(address,bytes32).notice: Get masked vault info (only after verification)

getVaultAlerts(address).notice: Get pending alerts for a vault

hasVerifiedAccess(address,address).notice: Check if user has verified access to a vault

initiateSecureSearch(string).notice: Initiate a secure search - returns masked info only

slashStake(bytes32,string).notice: Slash stake for fraudulent claim attempt
